final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit synchronous down-counter that decrements its value on each positive edge of the CLK signal. When RESET is asserted, the counter resets to zero. The counter also wraps around and resets to zero when it reaches its minimum value of 0.
module top_module(
    input CLK,
    input RESET,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);always @(posedge CLK) begin
    if (RESET) begin
        Q <= 4'b0;
    end else begin
        if (Q == 4'b1111) begin
            Q <= 4'b0;
        end else begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
